name: Tech Master (Aiden Thorne)
bio: Over 12 years of crafting award-winning digital experiences. Aiden blends advanced web technology, architectural principles, and cinematic design to set new standards in digital luxury.

name: Sophia Vance
bio: Specializes in WebGL, GPU programming, and custom GLSL shader choreography. Sophia makes sure that every 3D interaction runs at a blistering 60 FPS on any screen size.

name: Marcus Kane
bio: A performance expert focusing on code splitting, asset pipelining, and edge optimizations. Marcus ensures our cinematic experiences load instantly worldwide.
